customer_vision: VanArsdel's General Counsel drove this initiative after seeing a competitor use AI for contract review. The CIO is supportive but cautious on data privacy.
business_objectives: 8,000 Copilot users active and productive by go-live + 60 days
Legal contract review agent in production
success_criteria: Legal agent reduces contract review time by 50%
risks: Legal data privacy requirements restrict which documents can be processed by AI
pitfalls: Legal team is skeptical — contract review agent needs validation by external counsel
key_decisions: Copilot with SharePoint Restricted Content Discoverability for legal docs
Legal agent on private Azure OpenAI deployment (no public endpoint)
delivery_notes: Legal team skepticism is the cultural risk. Involve external counsel early in legal agent validation. Copilot adoption needs executive air cover — get CIO to do a launch video.
